mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation( reservation_code, reserved_for_at, reservation_status, total_price, adult_qty, child_qty, teen_qty, user_id, content_id, reservation_type, receiver_name, receiver_birth, receiver_phone, reserve_visit, receive_type, created_at ) VALUES ( #{reservation_code}, #{reserved_for_at}, #{reservation_status}, #{total_price}, #{adult_qty}, #{child_qty}, #{teen_qty}, #{user_id}, #{content_id}, #{reservation_type}, #{receiver_name}, #{receiver_birth}, #{receiver_phone}, #{reserve_visit}, #{receive_type}, NOW() )
